title: geofencing — PHP attribute contracts
description: One attribute: `#[GeofenceSubjectAlias]` for consumer models. Declares the snake_case morph alias that the model registers with the morph map + validates at boot that the alias is unique across the codebase.

attributes.name: GeofenceSubjectAlias

params.name: alias
params.description: The snake_case identifier used as `subject_type` on geofence_checks.

attributes.runtime_behaviour: GeofencingServiceProvider::boot() scans classes for #[GeofenceSubjectAlias]. Registers each alias in the morph map via Relation::enforceMorphMap(). At boot, refuses duplicate aliases across the codebase (raises ModuleBootException). Also validates the alias is snake_case.
